Question: What is the mean soil carbon exchange rate (Mg C ha-1 yr-1), averaged over these four specific measurements: the 2025 sulfate-reducing organoclastic oxidation measurement in the oxic mineral topsoil A horizon at Harvard Forest Long-Term Ecological Research (Massachusetts, USA); the 2025 sulfate-reducing organoclastic oxidation measurement in the peatland acrotelm layer at H.J. Andrews Experimental Forest (Oregon, USA); the 2010 acetoclastic methanogenesis dominated mineralization measurement in the oxic mineral topsoil A horizon at Coweeta Hydrologic Laboratory (North Carolina, USA); and the 2010 methanotrophic aerobic CH4 oxidation cascade measurement in the clayey reduced basin lens promoting Fe(III) reduction processes at Kilpisjärvi Research Station (Subarctic Finland)?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(SoilCarbonFlux) AS SoilCarbonFlux FROM (SELECT SoilCarbonFlux AS SoilCarbonFlux FROM SoilEdaphicFluxRegistry WHERE SiteIdentifier = "Harvard Forest Long-Term Ecological Research (Massachusetts, USA)" AND BiogenicPathway = "sulfate-reducing organoclastic oxidation sequence" AND EcoHydraulicStratum = "oxic mineral topsoil A horizon with rapid microbial turnover" AND SamplingEpoch = "2025" UNION ALL SELECT SoilCarbonFlux AS SoilCarbonFlux FROM SoilEdaphicFluxRegistry WHERE SiteIdentifier = "H.J. Question: What is the overall average greenhouse gas flux measured when combining the data collected during the 2020 intensive summer campaign affected by the pandemic, focusing on transient N₂O emissions linked to denitrification at the Forsinard bog's Carex-rich fen area; the 2017 repeated seasonal chamber measurements capturing episodic burst emissions through root and pore channels at the Tomakomai site's similar fen environment; and the long-term 2014 legacy sampling at Forsinard's hummock area dominated by Sphagnum and dwarf shrubs documenting lateral dissolved organic carbon export through porewater?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(GreenhouseFluxValue) AS GreenhouseFluxValue FROM (SELECT GreenhouseFluxValue AS GreenhouseFluxValue FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE SiteID = "Forsinard Flows research bog (Scotland)" AND BiomeMicrofacet = "tussock fen microfacet with Carex-dominated minerotrophic inputs" AND MeasurementInterval = "2020 pandemic-modified reduced field visits intensive summer campaign" AND ProcessDominantPathway = "coupled denitrification-N2O transient emissions during drawdown" UNION ALL SELECT GreenhouseFluxValue AS GreenhouseFluxValue FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE SiteID = "Tomakomai peatland experimental site (Japan)" AND BiomeMicrofacet = "tussock fen microfacet with Carex-dominated minerotrophic inputs" AND MeasurementInterval = "2017 chamber series spring-to-autumn repeated measurements" AND ProcessDominantPathway = "episodic ebullition pulses through macropore and root channels" UNION ALL SELECT GreenhouseFluxValue AS GreenhouseFluxValue FROM PeatlandFluxInventory WHERE SiteID = "Forsinard Flows research bog (Scotland)" AND BiomeMicrofacet = "hummock microrelief dominated by Sphagnum and ericaceous dwarf-shrub community" AND MeasurementInterval = "2014 legacy transect resampling for long-term trend analysis" AND ProcessDominantPathway = "porewater-mediated lateral DOC export with indirect CO2 flux implications");
